rejection_reason: structure: email_nurture_max_words — nurture follow-up email (sequence_step: 2) is 243 words, exceeding the 200-word maximum. Trim by removing the feature list and condensing the case study to one sentence.
text:
Subject: Re: {{company}}'s onboarding efficiency

Hey {{first_name}},

Following up on my previous note about streamlining onboarding at {{company}}.

I wanted to share a bit more context about what FlowAI actually does, since I kept my first email brief.

FlowAI is an AI-powered workflow automation platform that helps operations, HR, and people teams run more efficient onboarding programs without adding headcount. Here's what the platform includes:

- Automated task assignments for new hires
- Progress tracking dashboards for managers
- Integration with your existing HRIS and project management tools
- Customizable onboarding checklists and templates
- Slack and email notifications to keep everyone aligned
- Reporting and analytics on onboarding completion rates
- AI-generated onboarding plans based on role and department

One of our customers, a 300-person SaaS company similar to {{company}}, was struggling with inconsistent onboarding across departments. New hires were falling through the cracks, managers were spending hours manually tracking progress, and time-to-productivity was sitting at around 90 days. After implementing FlowAI, they cut time-to-productivity to 45 days, reduced manager onboarding overhead by 60%, and improved new hire satisfaction scores significantly.

I think {{company}} could see similar results given your current growth stage.

Would it make sense to chat for 20 minutes this week?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
